name: Q5539655
abstract: George Gee is a Chinese American swing big band leader. Born in New York City, he grew up with a fascination in the big band music of the 1930s and 1940s.

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Bert
about_quotes.evidence: I’m working with a band now, George Gee, and it’s been together for about fifteen years.
about_quotes.doc_title: Eddie Bert interviewed by Monk Rowe, Danbury, Connecticut, November 20, 2001
